name: Thordak
backstory: Cast out of the Ashkeeper clan for refusing to burn a rival village. Carries the guilt as a slow-burning grudge against those who wield fire as cruelty.

signatureItems.name: Ashkeeper's Broken Chain
signatureItems.detail: A length of clan-iron he never removes. Purely sentimental.

boons.name: Flametongue Greataxe
boons.detail: On command, erupts in flame for +2d6 fire damage on hit.

boons.name: Ring of Warmth
boons.detail: Immunity to cold environmental damage; resistance to cold.

boons.name: Innate Misty Step
boons.detail: Cast Misty Step once per short rest without a spell slot.
